channel.title: dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the dead-code-hunter codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: src/__tests__/ — dead-code-hunter Directory Structure
item.description: Directory listing for src/__tests__/ in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 files and 0 subdirectories.

item.title: DeadCodeProcessor Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Core logic for filtering, scoping, and transforming raw analysis results into actionable PR feedback. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeProcessor domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point and integration layer that orchestrates the execution within the GitHub Actions environment. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: External service integration handling the heavy lifting of static analysis and call-graph generation. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TestingSuite Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture
item.description: Validation framework providing unit and integration testing for the analysis pipeline. Architectural overview of the TestingSuite domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 2 source files.
